items.raw_desc: Termosztát EMOS P56A01 OpenTherm, szoba + emelet, programozható, vezetékes:The EMOS P56A01 thermostat is a classic wired programmable thermostat designed for precise control of heating and cooling in the home. It combines room control with an external floor sensor, making it suitable for both radiator systems and underfloor heating. Support for OpenTherm communication enables efficient control of modern boilers and optimization of their performance. The EMOS P56A01 thermostat works independently, without internet connection or mobile app. The device is designed for users who prefer reliable local control without smart features. It offers a backlit touchscreen, automatic and manual modes, ECO and holiday mode. It helps reduce energy consumption with precise temperature settings and programmes according to the day. It is suitable for new buildings and renovations where Wi-Fi control is not required.
